items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 46
items.note: For 'Slicing the Blades of Yesterday' — defeat Erika in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 46 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: If over the cap, catch a Skarmory, use the Legendary Beasts, or bring a high-friendship Pokémon with Return.
